name: accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, discrepancies between timesheets and accounting data cause late payroll processing. We automate payroll reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: discrepancies between timesheets and accounting data
